title: User Policy Configuration
description: User-customized evaluation configuration for the WASM/client boundary. Composes multiple policies with priority-based deduplication, standalone rules, and user-level overrides. This is the primary input type for client-side evaluation via evaluateUserConfig().

policy_ids.description: Policy IDs to evaluate. Each is resolved independently. Higher policy.priority wins when the same rule appears in multiple policies.

added_rules.description: Extra rule IDs not in any selected policy. Evaluated with user overrides only (no policy-level overrides).

overrides.description: User-level overrides. Applied AFTER the owning policy's overrides. Last-match-wins: user always takes precedence.

exclude_global.description: When true, rules whose regions are exclusively ["GLOBAL"] are excluded from policy resolution. Rules with at least one non-GLOBAL region are kept.

filter.description: Optional filter to narrow resolved rules by region, category, profile, or severity. Applied after policy resolution and override application.

RuleOverride.description: Override configuration for a single rule. Applied after policy-level overrides when used in UserPolicyConfig.

rule_id.description: Rule ID to override. Supports wildcards: 'financial.*' overrides all financial rules.

priority.description: Override evaluation priority. Higher = evaluated first.

enabled.description: Set false to disable rule without removing it.

reason.description: Explanation for why this override exists.

FilterParams.description: Parameters for filtering rules and policies in the WASM API. All filter arrays are optional; omitting a filter means 'no constraint' on that dimension.

regions.description: Filter by region codes. Only rules/policies with at least one matching region are returned.

include_ancestors.description: When true, selected regions expand to include ancestor regions (e.g., selecting US also includes AMERICAS and GLOBAL).

exclude_global.description: When true, remove GLOBAL from the effective region set after ancestor expansion.

ResolvedRuleInfo.description: Preview of a resolved rule in a UserPolicyConfig. Returned by resolveUserConfig() to show the execution plan without evaluating.

enabled.description: Whether the rule is enabled after overrides.

source_policy_id.description: Which policy owns this rule. Null if from added_rules.
